## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue if there is one (e.g. "Closes #12"). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat(scope):`, `fix(scope):`, `docs:`)
- [ ] No new npm dependencies (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] Slash-command bodies / scripts stay domain-generic — no hardcoded "speech" or a specific domain
- [ ] If adding a board: `templates/sources.yaml` entry tested locally
- [ ] If adding a domain template: `working/` files + a starter rubric are included
